name: interop
description: Import and migrate agent configuration between Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Plan Codex and Claude Code config migrations
interface.longDescription: Agent Interop provides a dry-run-first skill for comparing and migrating Codex and Claude Code settings, MCP configuration, skills, prompts, commands, and agent instructions without exposing secrets.
defaultPrompt: Plan a Codex and Claude config import
